name: remote-latexmk
description: Self-hosted remote LaTeX compiler with Docker Compose, dependency-aware uploads, MCP, and Agent Skills.

scripts.test: node scripts/sync-plugin-skills.mjs --check && node scripts/check-plugin.mjs && pnpm -r test
scripts.bundle:slim: pnpm --filter @latexmk/deploy build && node packages/deploy/dist/index.js bundle --profile slim --out dist/paas-slim
scripts.bundle:full: pnpm --filter @latexmk/deploy build && node packages/deploy/dist/index.js bundle --profile full --out dist/paas-full
